title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation that helps teachers introduce AI and machine learning to school-aged students. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training to support educators in teaching foundational AI and responsible AI ethics, and has reached educators in over 165 countries.
